---
title: "The Rt. Rev. William Heathcote DeLancey"
---

## The Rt. Rev. William Heathcote DeLancey

**Dates:** (1797-1865)

### Description

Bishop of Western New York

### Biography

It was certainly he, and not the Bishop of New York at this period, the Rt. Rev. Benjamin Treadwell Onderdonk, who attended the anniversary meeting of the Society for the Propagation of the Gospel as representative of the American Episcopal Church.

### Letters

- Letter from June 18th [1852[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
